SEARCH
Module se.kth.anderslm.invertcolors
Package lab4edisochdanils.model

Class ImageProcessorModel

java.lang.Object
lab4edisochdanils.model.ImageProcessorModel
public class ImageProcessorModel extends Object
Main class (facade) for the image processing model. Defines all methods that the controller needs access to.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ImageProcessorModel()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyOperation(ImageOperation operation)
    Applies an image processing operation based on the specified operation type.
    void
    applyWindowLevel(int level, int window)
    Applies Window/Level contrast adjustment to the image.*
    int[][]
    calculateHistogram()
    Calculates histogram for the current image.
    int[][]
    getCurrentPixels()
    Gets the current pixel matrix to be displayed.

    Loads a new image into the model.

  • Constructor Details

    • ImageProcessorModel

      public ImageProcessorModel()

  • Method Details

    • loadImage

      public void loadImage(int[][] pixels)
      Loads a new image into the model. Creates three copies of the image: original, processed and current.
      Parameters:
      pixels - the pixel matrix representing the image

    • getCurrentPixels

      public int[][] getCurrentPixels()
      Gets the current pixel matrix to be displayed.
      Returns:
      a copy of the current pixel matrix

    • applyWindowLevel

      public void applyWindowLevel(int level, int window)
      Applies Window/Level contrast adjustment to the image.*
      Parameters:
      level - active range (0-255)
      window - size of the range

    • calculateHistogram

      public int[][] calculateHistogram()
      Calculates histogram for the current image.
      Returns:
      histogram data as an int[256][3] matrix where first index is intensity (0-255) and second index is color (0=red, 1=green, 2=blue)

    • applyOperation

      public void applyOperation(ImageOperation operation)
      Applies an image processing operation based on the specified operation type. centralizing all operation handling
      Parameters:
      operation - chosen image processing operation
